verses.text: Tua ciangin Josef' tacil ahih manin Manasseh minam tungah tanh kipia hi. Manasseh minam sung panin tacil, Gilead' pa Makhir tungah Gilead gam leh Bashan gam kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah galhang mi ahi hi
Tua ciangin Manasseh minam a omlaite Abiezer, Halek, Asriel, Shekhem, Hefer, leh Shemida-te tungah a behbehin piakna kinei hi. Hihte pen Josef' tapa Manasseh' ta pasal suanlekhakte a behbeh ahi hi
Ahih hangin Manasseh' tapa Makhir, a tapa Hefer, a tapa Zelofehad in tapa neiloin tanu bek nei a, a tanute' min in: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah, leh Tirzah ahi hi

Amaute, siampi Eleazar leh Nun tapa Joshua leh makaite mai-ah pai uh a, “Ka sanggamte uh tawh gamh hong piakna dingin Topa in Moses thu pia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thupiakna bangin amau pate' sanggamte tawh amah in gamh a pia khawm hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jordan galkhatah Gilead leh Bashan-te simloh Manasseh tungah tanh sawm kia hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Manasseh' tanute in a tapate tawh gamh ngahkhawm uh hi. A omlai Manasseh mite tungah Gilead leitang kipia hi
Manasseh-te' gam in Asher panin Shekhem nisuahna lamah a om Mikmethath dong ban a, tua ciangin Entappuah mite' leitaw lamah a gamgi pai hi
Tappuah leitang pen Manasseh-a' ahi hi. Ahih hangin Manasseh gamgi-a om Tappuah khuapi pen Efraim tapate-a' ahi hi

Tua ciangin Kanah lui-ah a gamgi paisuk hi. Manasseh khuapite lak panin lui leitaw lama om hih lai-a khuapite pen Efraim-a' ahi hi. Tua ciangin lui leilu lampangah Manasseh gamgi paisuakin tuipi-ah tawp hi
Tua gam leitaw lamteng Efraim-a' hi-in, a leilu lamteng Manasseh-a' hi a, tuipi pen a gamgi hi a, leilu lamah Asher banin nisuahna lamah Issakhar a ban hi

Issakhar leh Asher gam sungah zong Manasseh in gam ngah a, tuate pen Bethshean leh a khuaneute, Ibleam leh a khuaneute, Dor-a tengte leh a khuaneute, Endor-a tengte leh a khuaneute, Taanak-a tengte leh a khuaneute, leh Megiddo-a tengte leh a khuaneute hi a, a thumna pen Nafath ahi hi
Ahi zongin Manasseh' tapate in hih khuapite luah zolo uh ahih manin tua gamah Kanaan mite teng teitei uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel mite tampi pha-in a hat uh ciangin amaute in Kanaan mite nasemin koih uh a, hawlkhiamang khinlo uh hi
Tua ciangin Josef minam in Joshua kiangah thu genin, “ Topa in kote thu hong pia khin a, kote mi tampi hi napi-in bang hangin ngah khat leh tanh khat bek gamh-in hong pia na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Note mi tampi pha a, Efraim mualtung gam pen note-a' dingin neulua ahih ciangin Perez leh Refaim gam tulakah pai un la, nomau-a' dingin gam sattawm un,” a ci hi

Josef minam in, “Kote-a' dingin mualtung gam kicing zolo hi. Ahi zongin zang gama teng Kanaan mite khempeuh, Bethshean leh a khuaneute, Jezreel Kuam sunga om mite pen sik leeng neite hi zel uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in Josef' suan Efraim leh Manasseh mite tungah, “Note mi tampi pha-in vanglian na hih manun tanh khat kia na nei kei ding uh hi

Mualtung gam pen note-a' hi ding a, tulak ahih hangin note in hah siangin a gamgi mong dong na luah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sik leeng nei-in, amaute a thahat hangin Kanaan mite na hawlkhiazo ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
